case_title: LADEZMA, VICTOR DOMINGO VS JAIME MALDONADO, DBA LA VICTORIA BAKERY et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LADEZMA, VICTOR DOMINGO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT JAIME MALDONADO, DBA LA VICTORIA BAKERY GABRIELA MALDONADO DBA LA VICTORIA BAKERY DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT GABRIELA MALDONADO. (NO SERVICE ON GABRIELA MALDONADO) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT JAIME MALDONADO, DBA LA VICTORIA BAKERY

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY LADEZMA, VICTOR DOMINGO AS TO DEFENDANT JAIME MALDONADO, DBA LA VICTORIA BAKERY GABRIELA MALDONADO DBA LA VICTORIA BAKERY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-28-2006 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-28-2006, CONTINUED BY COURT TO SEP-25-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 CONTINUED BY STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES TO 9/25/06 AT 1:30 P.M.
